{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sage’s apprentice
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is referred to as the [[Sage’s apprentice]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
